input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule S.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: s.3.1
            TITLE: cost event objective

            CONTENT:
            rule S.3.1: Cost Event Objective
S.3.1 Cost Event Objective 
The Cost and Manufacturing Event evaluates the ability of the team to consider budget and 
incorporate production considerations for production and efficiency.   
Making tradeoff decisions between content and cost based on the performance of each part 
and assembly and accounting for each part and process to meet a budget is part of Project 
Management.

final_answer: The Cost and Manufacturing Event evaluates the ability of the team to consider budget and incorporate production considerations for production and efficiency. Making tradeoff decisions between content and cost based on the performance of each part and assembly and accounting for each part and process to meet a budget is part of Project Management.
